title: Resinous Tender Mexican Burrata Enchiladas
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mexican dish featuring burrata cheese, marinated in a blend of spices and wrapped in tender tortillas, perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the burrata cheese to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Let the cheese marinate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
In a large skillet, warm the tortillas over medium heat for about 30 seconds on each side.
To assemble the enchiladas, lay a tortilla flat and spoon some of the marinated cheese down the center of the tortilla.
Roll the tortilla up and place it seam-side down in a baking dish, repeating with the remaining tortillas and cheese.
Pour the diced tomatoes over the top of the rolled enchiladas and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes to allow the cheese to melt and the tortillas to crisp up.
